caption: The video begins with a black screen displaying the text "Inégalités entre les villes haïtiennes?" which translates to "Inequalities between Haitian cities?" in English. The scene remains static, focusing on this question, suggesting that the video is likely an introduction or a segment designed to provoke thought and discussion about the disparities existing among different cities in Haiti. The simplicity of the visual—just white text on a black background—emphasizes the gravity and importance of the topic being addressed, setting the stage for a deeper exploration of urban inequalities in Haiti.
